---
name: Good First Issue
about: Suggest a beginner-friendly algorithm, data structure, or ML utility to add
title: "[Good First Issue] Add <name>"
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## What to add

Briefly describe the algorithm, data structure, or utility function to
implement (e.g. "Add a `bubble_sort` function to `algorithms/sorting/`").

## Where it goes

- **Source file:** `path/to/new_file.py`
- **Test file:** `tests/path/to/test_new_file.py`

## Checklist for whoever picks this up

- [ ] Function has type hints
- [ ] Function has a Google-style docstring
- [ ] A matching test file is added under `tests/`
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally

## New to open source?

Welcome! 🎉 Comment below to claim this issue, then check out
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for a full step-by-step guide. No
question is too basic — just ask!
